Name: Freelance Illustration Income
Description: Album covers, posters, menu art, and print commissions at $35/hr or project rate

Name: Zine & Print Sales
Description: Direct zine and risograph print sales at Zine Fest, Makers Collective, and henrydrawsthings.com

Name: Art Supplies & Materials
Description: Micron pens, Winsor & Newton ink, Bristol board, Copic markers, nibs — primarily Blick Art Materials

Name: Software Subscriptions
Description: Adobe CC $22.99, Squarespace $16, Spotify $11.99, Clip Studio Paint (owned), Vimeo sub

Description: Half share of Germantown garage studio — $100/mo split with Jake Sullivan

Name: Mileage & Transit
Description: WeGo transit pass $100/mo for commute to Copper Kettle and studio trips

Name: Brightpath Checking
Description: Brightpath Financial Credit Union everyday checking — primary operating account

Name: Brightpath Savings
Description: Brightpath Financial Credit Union savings — emergency buffer

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Outstanding freelance invoices — currently Hillsboro Village holiday poster

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Vendor bills outstanding — typically $0 for sole proprietor

Name: Credit Card — Brightpath Visa
Description: $1,500 limit credit card — paid in full monthly. Used for supplies and subscriptions.

Name: Printing & Production
Description: Risograph print runs, zine printing costs for sale inventory
